model_specification_line: result = smf.wls('fulltime ~ daca_eligible * post + C(year) + C(statefip)', data=df, weights=df['weight']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['statefip']})
sample_selection: yrimmig - birthyr <= 15 (arrived before 16th birthday, DACA criterion)
yrimmig <= 2007 (arrived by 2007, proxy for continuous US residence since June 15, 2007)
year in {2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016} (pre/post periods, 2012 excluded as DACA transition year)
